mapper.select: select if(gender = 1,'男','女' ) name, count(*) num from emp group by gender

select case when job = 1 then '学工部' when job = 2 then '研发部' when job = 3 then '咨询部' when job = 4 then '就业部' when job = 5 then '人事部' when job = 6 then '行政部' else '未知部门' end as pos , count(*) num from emp group by job order by num;
mapper.update:
update emp
username=#{username},
password= #{password},
name= #{name},
gender= #{gender},
phone= #{phone},
job= #{job},
salary= #{salary},
image= #{image},
entry_date= #{entryDate},
dept_id= #{deptId},
update_time= #{updateTime},
where id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
